/usr/bin/ar qc libsearch_engine.a CMakeFiles/search_engine.dir/src/core/normalizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/search_engine.dir/src/core/tokenizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/search_engine.dir/src/index/inverted_index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/search_engine.dir/src/io/wiki_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/search_engine.dir/src/io/parallel_index_builder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/search_engine.dir/src/io/doc_store.cpp.o CMakeFiles/search_engine.dir/src/crawl/html_extractor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/search_engine.dir/src/crawl/crawler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/search_engine.dir/src/index/index_snapshot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/search_engine.dir/src/query/query_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/search_engine.dir/src/query/query_executor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/search_engine.dir/src/ranking/bm25_ranker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/search_engine.dir/src/suggest/trie.cpp.o CMakeFiles/search_engine.dir/src/suggest/spell_corrector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/search_engine.dir/src/search/query_cache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/search_engine.dir/src/search/search_service.cpp.o CMakeFiles/search_engine.dir/src/search/opensearch_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/search_engine.dir/src/api/http_server.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libsearch_engine.a
